mapper.select: SELECT * FROM interv_session WHERE prescription_id = #{prescriptionId} AND del_flag = '0' ORDER BY session_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO interv_session ( user_id, tenant_id, device_id, equipment_code, device_code, exercise_type, completed_sets, total_reps, total_volume_kg, duration_minutes, avg_heart_rate, calories_burned, session_date, session_time, prescription_id, stage, del_flag, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{tenantId}, #{deviceId}, #{equipmentCode}, #{deviceCode}, #{exerciseType}, #{completedSets}, #{totalReps}, #{totalVolumeKg}, #{durationMinutes}, #{avgHeartRate}, #{caloriesBurned}, #{sessionDate}, #{sessionTime}, #{prescriptionId}, #{stage}, '0', #{createBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE interv_session SET completed_sets = #{completedSets}, total_reps = #{totalReps}, total_volume_kg = #{totalVolumeKg}, duration_minutes = #{durationMinutes}, avg_heart_rate = #{avgHeartRate}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND del_flag = '0'
